title: Hearts Steadfast After Guidance
summary: A Quranic plea asking Allah not to let the heart turn after guidance.
repeat_guidance: No fixed repetition count is attached in this entry.

supplications.arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تُزِغْ قُلُوبَنَا بَعْدَ إِذْ هَدَيْتَنَا وَهَبْ لَنَا مِن لَّدُنكَ رَحْمَةً ۚ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ الْوَهَّابُ
supplications.transliteration: Rabbana la tuzigh qulubana baada idh hadaytana wa hab lana min ladunka rahmah. Innaka anta al-Wahhab.
supplications.translation: Our Lord, do not let our hearts deviate after You have guided us, and grant us mercy from Yourself. Indeed, You are the Bestower.
